events.name: breakthrough
events.description: New hydroponics technique doubles crop yield per unit water.

events.name: alien_signal
events.description: Anomalous radio signal detected from Phobos.

events.name: earth_contact
events.description: Earth sends updated colony charter with governance suggestions.

subsim_log.expression: (let ((trust-score (* empathy resolve))) (if (> trust-score 0.4) (+ trust-score faith) (- trust-score paranoia)))
(let ((trust-score (* empathy resolve))) (if (> trust-score 0.4) (+ trust-score faith) (- trust-score paranoia)))
(let ((survival (+ (* food 0.3) (* water 0.3) (* power 0.2) (* air 0.2)))) (if (> survival 0.6) (+ survival 0.1) (- survival 0.2)))

meta_awareness.insight: Luna Tide notices patterns in the dust storms that feel authored.
Grove Ash asks: 'If I am a LisPy data structure, can I rewrite myself?'

memories.event: Anomalous radio signal detected from Phobos.

Phobos eclipses the sun — 30 seconds of twilight at noon.
Coronal mass ejection detected — 48 hours to shelter.
Message from Earth: supply ship confirmed for next launch window.

## Year 75

- [GRN] **breakthrough**: New hydroponics technique doubles crop yield per unit water.
- [GRN] **alien_signal**: Anomalous radio signal detected from Phobos.
- [GRN] **earth_contact**: Earth sends updated colony charter with governance suggestions.

diaries.text:
**Rust Tid** (fire/pioneer) — Year 75

Another year. We are still here.

We did something impossible today.
The signal... I do not know what to think.

*— Rust Tid, pioneer*

**Zeph Wind** (air/trickster) — Year 75

Another year. We are still here.

We did something impossible today.
The signal... I do not know what to think.

*— Zeph Wind, trickster*

**Rust Vega** (earth/engineer) — Year 75

The earth in me stirs with possibility.

We did something impossible today.
The signal... I do not know what to think.

*— Rust Vega, engineer*
